name: cairn
description: Native macOS Computer Use MCP for Cursor (9 tools, Set-of-Mark screenshots, policy).

interface.shortDescription: Native macOS control for Cursor agents — accessibility tree, Set-of-Mark screenshots, and policy.
interface.longDescription: Cairn connects Cursor to a native macOS MCP server. It exposes nine desktop tools (list_apps, get_app_state, click, scroll, type_text, and more), Set-of-Mark screenshot overlays, optional Apple Vision OCR, and policy files to block password managers. Permissions live on Cairn.app, so Cursor never needs direct Accessibility access.
defaultPrompt: List running apps and capture get_app_state for the target app before clicking
Use element_index from the accessibility tree instead of coordinate clicks when possible
Verify UI changes with a follow-up get_app_state after each action
